HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Searching...
No Matches
Domain.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.

5
6#include "Domain.h"
7#include <iostream>
8
9// -----------------------------
10// Construction & lifetime
11// -----------------------------
12Domain::Domain(SurfaceMesh *mesh, int dIndex, dcmplx inVacuumWavelength)
13 : vacuumWavelength(inVacuumWavelength),
14 omega(2 * PI / inVacuumWavelength * CVAC),
15 index(dIndex) { AddTrianglesFromMesh(mesh, dIndex); }
16
17Domain::~Domain() {}
18
19int Domain::Index() { return index; }
20
21// -----------------------------
22// Mesh / basis assembly
23// -----------------------------
24int Domain::AddTrianglesFromMesh(SurfaceMesh *mesh, int dIndex) {
25 std::vector<Triangle *> inTriangles = mesh->BorderingTriangles(dIndex);
26 std::vector<Triangle *>::iterator triIter;
27 for (triIter = inTriangles.begin(); triIter != inTriangles.end(); triIter++) {
28 int side((*triIter)->DomainPosition(dIndex));
29 if (side == FRONT || side == BACK) {
30 // One RWG per directed edge (three hRWGs per triangle here)
31 rwgFuns.push_back(RWGFun(mesh, *triIter, (*triIter)->NodePtr(0), side));
32 rwgFuns.push_back(RWGFun(mesh, *triIter, (*triIter)->NodePtr(1), side));
33 rwgFuns.push_back(RWGFun(mesh, *triIter, (*triIter)->NodePtr(2), side));
34
35 // Feed triangle to BSP for inside/outside classification
36 bspTree.AddElement(*triIter, side);
37 }
38 }
39
40 // Build the BSP tree (choose last polygon as splitter and branch recursively)
41 bspTree.SetSplitter();
42 bspTree.Branch();
43
44 std::cout << "Added " << inTriangles.size() << " triangles and "
45 << rwgFuns.size() << " RWG functions to domain " << dIndex
46 << std::endl;
47
48 return inTriangles.size();
49}
50
51// -----------------------------
52// Global accuracy flag
53// -----------------------------
54bool Domain::NeedsAccurate = false;
55void Domain::EnableAccurate() { NeedsAccurate = true; }
56
57// -----------------------------
58// Formulation assembly hooks
59// -----------------------------
60int Domain::FillLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *matrix) {
61 return formulation->FillLSEMatrix(matrix);
62}
63
64int Domain::FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *matrix,
65 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *gradmatrix[3]) {
66 return formulation->FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(matrix, gradmatrix);
67}
68
69int Domain::FillLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *vector) {
70 return formulation->FillLSEVector(vector);
71}
72
73// -----------------------------
74// Geometry queries
75// -----------------------------
76bool Domain::IsInside(rvec point) {
77 if (bspTree.TestPoint(point) == -1) return true;
78 return false;
79}
80
81// -----------------------------
82// Incident field handling
83// -----------------------------
84bool Domain::hasDipoles() {
85 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
86 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++) {
87 if ((*incIter)->IsDipole()) return true;
88 }
89 return false;
90}
91
92// Add an incident condition
93int Domain::AddIncident(IncidentField *inIncident) {
94 incidentFields.push_back(inIncident);
95 return 0;
96}
97
98// -----------------------------
99// Field evaluation (post‑processing)
100// -----------------------------
101// Secondary (scattered) electric field at a point from the solution vector.
102cvec Domain::SecFieldE(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos) {
103 cvec result(0, 0, 0);
104 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
105 using std::vector;
106 using std::pair;
107 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
108
109 // Group hRWGs that belong to the same triangle
110 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
111 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
112 rwgPerTri.clear();
113 for (rwgN = rwgM;
114 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
115 rwgN++) {
116 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
117 }
118 // Compute operators for this group of hRWGs
119 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappa(
120 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
121 grnFun->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappa);
122
123 // Accumulate field contributions from this group of hRWGs
124 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
125 result -= I * omega * MU0 * Mu(pos) * DeltaKappa[i].first *
126 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex()) +
127 DeltaKappa[i].second *
128 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset);
129 }
130 }
131 return result;
132}
133
134// Total incident electric field at a point from all incident sources.
135cvec Domain::IncFieldE(rvec pos) {
136 cvec incField(0, 0, 0);
137 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
138 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++)
139 incField += (*incIter)->EvaluateE(pos);
140 return incField;
141}
142
143// Secondary (scattered) magnetic field at a point from the solution vector.
144cvec Domain::SecFieldH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos) {
145 cvec result(0, 0, 0);
146 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
147 using std::vector;
148 using std::pair;
149 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
150
151 // Group hRWGs that belong to the same triangle
152 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
153 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
154 rwgPerTri.clear();
155 for (rwgN = rwgM;
156 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
157 rwgN++) {
158 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
159 }
160 // Compute operators for this group of hRWGs
161 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappa(
162 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
163 grnFun->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappa);
164
165 // Accumulate field contributions from this group of hRWGs
166 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
167 result -= I * omega * EPS0 * Epsilon(pos) * DeltaKappa[i].first *
168 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset) -
169 DeltaKappa[i].second * (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex());
170 }
171 }
172 return result;
173}
174
175// Secondary E-/H-fields at a point.
176std::pair<cvec, cvec> Domain::SecFieldEandH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector,
177 rvec pos) {
178 std::pair<cvec, cvec> result(make_pair(cvec(0, 0, 0), cvec(0, 0, 0)));
179 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
180 using std::vector;
181 using std::pair;
182 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
183
184 // Group hRWGs that belong to the same triangle
185 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
186 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
187 rwgPerTri.clear();
188 for (rwgN = rwgM;
189 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
190 rwgN++) {
191 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
192 }
193 // Compute operators for this group of hRWGs
194 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappa(
195 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
196 grnFun->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappa);
197
198 // Accumulate field contributions from this group of hRWGs
199 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
200 result.first -= I * omega * MU0 * Mu(pos) * DeltaKappa[i].first *
201 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex()) +
202 DeltaKappa[i].second *
203 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset);
204 result.second -=
205 I * omega * EPS0 * Epsilon(pos) * DeltaKappa[i].first *
206 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset) -
207 DeltaKappa[i].second * (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex());
208 }
209 }
210 return result;
211}
212
213// Total incident magnetic field at a point from all incident sources.
214cvec Domain::IncFieldH(rvec pos) {
215 cvec incField(0, 0, 0);
216 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
217 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++)
218 incField += (*incIter)->EvaluateH(pos);
219 return incField;
220}
221
222// -----------------------------
223// Power computation
224// -----------------------------
230cvec conj(cvec in) { return cvec(conj(in(0)), conj(in(1)), conj(in(2))); }
231
237rvec real(cvec in) { return rvec(real(in(0)), real(in(1)), real(in(2))); }
238
239/* Calculation details based on Section 4 of
240 * A. Kern, "Realistic modeling of 3D plasmonic
241 * systems: A surface integral equation approach,"
242 * Ph.D. thesis, Nanophotonics and Metrology Lab.,
243 * EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland, 2011.
244 */
245double Domain::Power(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector) {
246 double result(0.);
247 std::vector<Triangle *> vTri;
248 std::vector<dcmplx> vA, vB;
249 std::vector<cvec> vAP, vBP;
250 std::vector<rvec> vNormals;
251
252 for (std::vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgIter = rwgFuns.begin();
253 rwgIter != rwgFuns.end(); rwgIter++) {
254 int triIndex(-1);
255 for (uint i(0); i < vTri.size(); i++)
256 if (vTri.at(i) == rwgIter->TrianglePtr()) triIndex = i;
257 if (triIndex == -1) {
258 triIndex = vTri.size();
259 vTri.push_back(rwgIter->TrianglePtr());
260 vA.push_back(0.);
261 vB.push_back(0.);
262 vAP.push_back(cvec(0, 0, 0));
263 vBP.push_back(cvec(0, 0, 0));
264 vNormals.push_back(
265 rwgIter->TrianglePtr()->FBNormalVector(rwgIter->Side()));
266 }
267 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
268 dcmplx addA(conj((*solVector)(rwgIter->EdgeIndex()) *
269 rwgIter->RWGPreFactor() / 2.));
270 dcmplx addB((*solVector)(rwgIter->EdgeIndex() + offset) *
271 rwgIter->RWGPreFactor() / 2.);
272 vA.at(triIndex) = vA.at(triIndex) + addA;
273 vB.at(triIndex) = vB.at(triIndex) + addB;
274 vAP.at(triIndex) = vAP.at(triIndex) + addA * rwgIter->FreeVertex();
275 vBP.at(triIndex) = vBP.at(triIndex) + addB * rwgIter->FreeVertex();
276 }
277 for (uint i(0); i < vTri.size(); i++) {
278 rvec normal = vNormals.at(i);
279 rvec centroid = vTri.at(i)->Center();
280 double area = vTri.at(i)->Area();
281 result +=
282 real(area *
283 dot(normal, cross((cvec)centroid, (cvec)(vB.at(i) * vAP.at(i) -
284 vA.at(i) * vBP.at(i))) +
285 cross((cvec)vAP.at(i), (cvec)vBP.at(i)))) /
286 2.;
287 }
288 return result;
289}
290
291// -----------------------------
292// Incident cleanup
293// -----------------------------
294int Domain::ClearIncidentFields() {
295 while (incidentFields.size() > 0) {
296 delete incidentFields.back();
297 incidentFields.pop_back();
298 }
299 return 0;
300}
301
302// -----------------------------
303// Debug utilities
304// -----------------------------
305int Domain::PrintAllRWGCentroids() {
306 std::vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgIter;
307 for (rwgIter = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgIter != rwgFuns.end(); rwgIter++) {
308 Triangle *ptr = rwgIter->TrianglePtr();
309 rvec n1 = ptr->Node(0);
310 rvec n2 = ptr->Node(1);
311 rvec n3 = ptr->Node(2);
312 rvec ctr = (n1 + n2 + n3) / 3.;
313 std::cout << "Triangle: " << n1 << std::endl;
314 std::cout << " " << n2 << std::endl;
315 std::cout << " " << n3 << std::endl;
316 std::cout << " Fvx: " << rwgIter->FreeVertex() << std::endl;
317 std::cout << " RWG: " << rwgIter->Evaluate(ctr) << std::endl;
318 }
319 return 0;
320}
321
322int Domain::PrintAllEdges(SurfaceMesh *mesh) {
323 for (int i(0); i < mesh->EdgeCount(); ++i) {
324 std::cout << "EDGE " << i << " :" << std::endl;
325 for (unsigned int j(0); j < rwgFuns.size(); ++j) {
326 if (rwgFuns[j].EdgeIndex() == i) {
327 Triangle *ptr = rwgFuns[j].TrianglePtr();
328 rvec n1 = ptr->Node(0);
329 rvec n2 = ptr->Node(1);
330 rvec n3 = ptr->Node(2);
331 rvec ctr = (n1 + n2 + n3) / 3.;
332
333 std::cout << " Center: " << ctr << std::endl;
334 std::cout << " RWG: " << rwgFuns[j].Evaluate(ctr) << std::endl;
335 }
336 }
337 }
338 return 0;
339}
340
341RWGFun *Domain::RGWFunPtr(int index) { return &(rwgFuns[index]); }
342
343int Domain::InitLookupTable(LookupTableBin *tin) {
344 grnFun->InitLookupTable(tin);
345 return 0;
346}
